summary: Tested Create Deposit modal phone visibility and search functionality. All features working correctly: supervisors see masked phone numbers (e.g., *******7898), admins see full phone numbers, searchable dropdown filters clients by name, and deposit creation works via API.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented: Lines 477-479 and 509-511 use phone_display field which respects visibility settings
Searchable dropdown implemented using Command/Popover components (lines 464-537)
Search filters by fullName and email (lines 499-505)
seed_data_creation: Created test deposit via API: 500 EUR IBAN deposit for 'hello hello' client assigned to 'Audit Test User' agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone visibility in Create Deposit modal verified working. Supervisor sees masked phones (e.g., ***4545, *******7898, +39 *** *** *5446). Admin sees full phone numbers (e.g., 5444545, 49845217898, 393381660770). Search functionality filters clients by name. Deposit creation API works correctly.

phone_visibility_supervisor.details: Supervisor sees masked phone numbers in client dropdown: hello hello (***4545), mario mario (*******7898), client (+39 *** *** *5446)

phone_visibility_admin.details: Admin sees full phone numbers in client dropdown: hello hello (5444545), mario mario (49845217898), Helene Podboroczynski (393381660770)

search_functionality.details: Search input present in dropdown, filters clients by name. Searching 'mario' correctly shows only 'mario mario' client

deposits_page_supervisor.details: Deposits page loads correctly for supervisor with Create Deposit button visible

deposits_page_admin.details: Deposits page loads correctly for admin showing 6 total deposits with pending/approved/rejected filters

deposit_creation_api.details: Deposit creation via API works correctly - created 500 EUR IBAN deposit successfully

deposit_creation.result: Deposit created successfully with id ef72904e-5fd5-4240-a8a5-87f48ba63dcd
